calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Amended Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Dec-10-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this date. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patrick Heard. Petitioner, Thomas John Brandi, Jr. was sworn and examined. The Court grants Decree changing Petitioner's name to Rico Thomas Brandi. Decree signed in open court.

ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Oct-29-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on this dates regular calendar. Present:Commissioner:Loretta M. Norris, Clerk:John Stokes, Reporter:Valerie Papale. Off-Calendar. No appearance by petitioner.
